Home / Service Areas / Hilliard

Flooring in Hilliard, OH

Trusted local professionals serving Hilliard and surrounding communities

Serving Hilliard, OH

Hilliard, OH's family-friendly subdivisions from the 1980s-90s benefit from Onyx Flooring's tailored solutions. We address the challenges of snowy winters and freeze-thaw damage with flooring options designed for longevity. Whether you need kid-proof laminate, cozy carpet, or scratch-resistant hardwood, our team ensures flawless installation for Hilliard households.

Hilliard offers a suburban feel with highly rated schools and community-focused amenities.

Flooring Services in Hilliard

Hardwood Flooring

Timeless wood floors engineered for Ohio's humidity swings.

Learn more →

Luxury Vinyl Plank

Waterproof flooring perfect for basements and busy households.

Learn more →

Tile Flooring

Durable ceramic and stone for high-traffic areas.

Learn more →

Carpet Installation

Plush, stain-resistant carpets for cozy Ohio winters.

Learn more →

Floor Refinishing

Restore original hardwood to its former glory.

Learn more →

Contact us today for a free estimate. We provide professional, reliable service throughout Hilliard and the surrounding area.
